text.message: Reds got 694 on way back. Ripperoni... Gl hf guys
Shame about us not being able to trade blue
Was expecting us to be partners
Solo me in this 4th position, has consequences
but you are not going to
I was never going to lol
that was such a weird unprovoked lie lol
I was just protecting from RB when I played that road
Genuinely was only reason I played road when I said it... You had the yop for the settle
Blue just road settles so all good...
Yeh think greens probably won if I didn't do that. So in end it's blue it's helped
